name: drinaluza
description: Drinaluza, business manager app (mobile and web client)
author: Ahmed Derbala <derbala.ahmed531992@gmail.com>

scripts.sync: npm run sync:ss && npm run sync:v
scripts.releases:changelog: npm run sync:v && cp CHANGELOG.md ../drinaluza-expo-releases/ && cd ../drinaluza-expo-releases && git add . && git commit -m 'Update changelog' && git push
scripts.releases:apk: gh release create v$npm_package_version ./builds/$npm_package_name-$npm_package_version.apk --repo ahmed-derbala/drinaluza-expo-releases --title "Release v$npm_package_version" --notes-file CHANGELOG.md
scripts.frl: cp .env.sample .env && npm run i && npm run start:local
scripts.eas:build-prod-locally: export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && NODE_ENV=production eas build -p android --profile production --local --output=./builds/$npm_package_name-$npm_package_version.apk
scripts.build:apk-prod: npm run env:prod && npm run eas:build-prod-locally && npm run releases:changelog && npm run releases:apk && npm run env:local && npm run ver
scripts.build:web: npm run clean:prod && NODE_ENV=production expo export -p web
scripts.start:local: rm -rf .expo && npm run env:local && expo start -c
scripts.dev:c: rm -rf .expo && npm run env:local && expo start -c
scripts.i: npm i -g eas-cli expo expo-doctor && npm i
scripts.fix: npm run env:local && npm run i:check && expo-doctor
scripts.rmallexceptpackagelock: rm -rf builds logs dist android ios .expo node_modules
scripts.clean:prod: npm run rmallexceptpackagelock && npm run i:prod
scripts.clean: npm run clean:only && npm run i
scripts.push: npm run format && git add . && git commit -m
scripts.pushd: npm run format && git add . && git commit -m
scripts.pull: git pull origin main && npm run i && npm run start:local
